page: Amazon Web Services r8gd.48xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by AWS Graviton processors. It features 192 dedicated physical cores on the ARMv9 architecture using the Neoverse-V2 model, running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The system is equipped with 1536.0 GB of system memory, translating to 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the instance includes 11400 GB of NVMe SSD instance store volumes. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 50 Gbps, managed via the AWS Nitro hypervisor.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier multi-core performance, with stress-ng multi-core CPU performance, Geekbench multi-core scores, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression all placing in the top 10%. Memory subsystem performance is highly efficient, registering top-tier results in both cached small-block read bandwidth and uncached large-block read/write operations. Database and key-value store operations are highly optimized, as evidenced by top-tier performance in Redis SET operations and Passmark database tests. However, single-core metrics, such as stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core scores, fall into the average tier, and small-model LLM prompt processing is relatively weak.

The r8gd.48xlarge offers high resource density, combining substantial memory capacity with a large local NVMe SSD footprint. This architectural profile provides qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring high memory-to-vCPU ratios and fast local scratch space without the overhead of network-attached storage. This instance is highly suited for large-scale in-memory databases, high-throughput Redis deployments, data warehousing, heavy multi-threaded processing, and static web serving at scale.
description: Amazon Web Services r8gd.48xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 192 dedicated ARMv9 Neoverse-V2 cores running at 2.7 GHz. It is equipped with 1536.0 GB of RAM, 11400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, and a 50 Gbps baseline network interface. Operating on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, this instance delivers top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance, alongside outstanding results in database operations and Redis throughput. While single-core performance and small-model LLM prompt processing are average to weak, its massive memory capacity and high-speed local storage make it highly efficient for memory-intensive and storage-heavy workloads. The r8gd.48xlarge is optimized for large-scale in-memory databases, high-throughput key-value stores, and intensive multi-threaded data processing.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8gd.48xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 192 ARMv9 cores, 1536 GB RAM, and 11400 GB NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier multi-core and database performance.

tagline: A high-density ARMv9 memory-optimized platform featuring massive local NVMe storage and top-tier multi-core performance for demanding database workloads.

Equipped with 1536.0 GB of RAM and 11400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
